# Micro Frac

**Summary**: A technique to measure minimum horizontal stress and closure pressure.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-al-haidary|Al-Haidary, 2014]] used micro-frac tests to determine the closure pressure of the formation.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The estimated closure pressure from micro-frac tests was in the range of 106 - 120 pcf (0.73 - 0.83 psi/ft). ([[2014-al-haidary|Al-Haidary, 2014, p. 26]])
